notes: All 9 responses correctly identify the core Waldo-style dense beach scene, the multi-color sailboats/steamships, striped beach huts and umbrellas, and correctly state there is no legible text — a strong consistent baseline at this quant/model. The single most common miss across every response is misidentifying the far-right blue-and-white hovercraft (its top lift-fans read as 'crosses' per GT) — typically as a chapel, lifeguard station, beach bar, or ferry. Per dense-scene rules, invented minor characters (juggler, unicycle, donkey, pirate child, etc.) are NOT counted as hallucinations. None of the responses identify the hidden characters (Waldo/Odlaw/Wizard Whitebeard), and none invent a wrong artist, a pier, or a lighthouse. The t0.1/rep0 response edges ahead for most cleanly enumerating verified elements (landmasses, horses, human pyramid) with the least clutter.
